name: TAITRON COMPONENTS INC
business: TAITRON COMPONENTS INC is primarily a supplier of original designed and manufactured (ODM) products and also distributes brand name electronic components. The company focuses on providing ODM products for OEMs and CEMs, with product offerings ranging from discrete semiconductors through small electronic devices.

exposures.sentence: Our product offerings range from discrete semiconductors through small electronic devices.

Our ODM Projects are custom made and are marketed in specific industries such as: wild animal feeders, timers for DC motors, public street light controllers, LED modules for swimming pools and water fountain lights, LED headlamps for vacuum cleaners, battery testers, universal remote-control devices and battery chargers.
